creator: hiren@FreeBSD.org
text:
I am on recent current with clang.

Build fails somewhere here:

--- src/CMakeFiles/bro.dir/NFS.cc.o ---
/home/usr_local/bin/cmake -E cmake_progress_report /home/ports/security/bro/work/bro-2.1/build/CMakeFiles 
[ 69%] Building CXX object src/CMakeFiles/bro.dir/NFS.cc.o
cd /home/ports/security/bro/work/bro-2.1/build/src && /usr/bin/c++   -DBRO_BUILD_PATH=\"/home/ports/security/bro/work/bro-2.1/build/src\" -DBRO_SCRIPT_INSTALL_PATH=\"/usr/local/share/bro\" -DBRO_SCRIPT_SOURCE_PATH=\"/home/ports/security/bro/work/bro-2.1/scripts\" -O2 -pipe -fno-strict-aliasing -Wall -Wno-unused -O2 -g -DNDEBUG -I/home/ports/security/bro/work/bro-2.1/build/src -I/home/ports/security/bro/work/bro-2.1/src -I/usr/local/include -I/home/ports/security/bro/work/bro-2.1/build/aux/binpac/lib -I/home/ports/security/bro/work/bro-2.1/aux/binpac/lib -I/home/ports/security/bro/work/bro-2.1/build -o CMakeFiles/bro.dir/NFS.cc.o -c /home/ports/security/bro/work/bro-2.1/src/NFS.cc
--- src/CMakeFiles/bro.dir/Expr.cc.o ---
/home/ports/security/bro/work/bro-2.1/src/Expr.cc:2392:9: error: reference to 'is_assignable' is ambiguous

               ^

extern int is_assignable(BroType* t);
           ^

struct is_assignable
       ^
